status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
alternate_names: KUNBUS Product Security Incident Response Team
notes: KUNBUS GmbH is a German manufacturer of industrial communication and automation solutions, including the Revolution Pi platform. KUNBUS PSIRT publishes security advisories in CSAF format covering their industrial products.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format.
data.notes: CSAF csaf_trusted_provider. Contact: product-security@kunbus.com. Provides directories for white, amber, green, and red TLP classifications.
